resources.string: Standalone implementation of three-finger swipe screenshots using the modern LSPosed API
Minimum downward distance to register a swipe, as a percent of the screen\'s shortest dimension. Lower values trigger more easily but increase false positives.
Ignore touches starting within this distance from any screen edge. Prevents conflicts with system back gestures and navigation bars.
Maximum time between the first and last finger touching down to count as a simultaneous 3-finger tap. Increase if your fingers don\'t land at exactly the same time.
Minimum time between consecutive screenshots. Prevents accidental rapid-fire captures from a single long swipe.
Reflection (recommended)\nCalls the system screenshot API directly via DisplayPolicy or ScreenshotHelper. Works on stock and Pixel ROMs.
SYSRQ key injection\nSimulates a Print Screen key press. Use only if Reflection does nothing on your ROM. Apps can intercept this key.
Restore all gesture settings to their original values
